quote: the boundary between presentation and domain logic must remain unidirectional everywhere
finding: src/foo.ts imports a presentation helper from a domain module, inverting the layering.
recommendation: Move the helper into a shared contracts module and re-export from both sides.

quote: every public module entry point must declare its exported surface explicitly via index files
finding: src/bar.ts re-exports an internal symbol without listing it in any index file.
recommendation: Add the re-export to src/index.ts or mark the symbol as internal.
